title: Steel Domination
description: Add steel ore to Minecraft. More powerful than iron.
body:
One level more than iron.


This mod adds a new mineral, which is steel. It adds tools and blocks.





📃 Feature List
  • New ores
  • Custom archivements
  • New tools & armor
🚫 Upcoming before to release version
  • New archivements
  • Reforce ores
  • Steel Armor
🌎 Supported Languages
  • English
  • Spanish
